title: Retro64 [FABRIC]
body:
**This mod is a FABRIC PORT. the forge version can be found [here](https://retro64mod.github.io)**

 
99% of this mod was made by [dylanpdx](https://twitter.com/pdxdylan) all I did was some minor conversion to fabric, with permission from them.


This mod lets you play your favorite 1996 platformer game in a modern Minecraft world.

For more info on how the mod works, as well as an FAQ, check out [the website](https://retro64mod.github.io) for the forge version.

### Requires:
- [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
- A Super Mario 64 ROM
- [Controllable (For Optional Controller Support)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controllable)
 

### Controls:

M key: Toggle between Minecraft mode and ‘Retro64 mode’
Z key: Open character selection menu
Left Alt: Punch/Action
Sneak key (usually Shift): Crouch
 

### NOTES:
- I will not be releasing a 1.18 version of this mod, as one of the internal dependencies has no 1.18 version.
- I will not inform anyone on how to get a ROM of Super Mario 64.
